name: Fito Páez
description: '''Rodolfo''' "'''Fito'''" '''Páez''' ({{IPA|es|ˈfito ˈpaes}}; born 13 March 1963) is an Argentine [[Latin rock]] musician and filmmaker. A former member of the Trova Rosarina, he is dubbed the "[[Troubadour]] of [[Argentine rock]]" and is considered an important figure in the genre and in [[Latin music]].
